label: Config Loader
info:
Loads JSON config files from /config/ into global.config namespace.

BEFORE USING:
- Configure the 'Highland MQTT' broker node with hub IP and svc_nodered credentials
- If you already have an MQTT broker config node, update the broker ID references
  in the three MQTT nodes below to point to your existing broker node instead.

Triggers:
- Startup (0.5s delay after deploy)
- Manual inject
- MQTT: highland/command/config/reload            (full reload)
- MQTT: highland/command/config/reload/{name}     (selective reload)

Valid {name} values: device_registry, flow_registry, notifications,
                     thresholds, healthchecks, secrets

name: Load Configs
